X/X/Sāmaññaphalasutta/150.text: Aṁ 2. 119; Vi 2. 73; Vi 4. 223; Vi 5. 332; Khu 6. 30 piṭṭhādīsu.
Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 1; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 28; Apadāna-Ṭṭha 1. 78; Buddhavaṁsa-Ṭṭha 333; Jātaka-Ṭṭha 1. 76 piṭṭhesu.
Ma 1. 391 piṭṭhe. 4. Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 275 piṭṭhe. 5. Khu 1. 13; Khu 10. 107 piṭṭhesu.

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaabhinavaṭīkā/Sāmaññap.text: Visuddhi 1. 203; Vi-Ṭṭha 1. 95; Udāna-Ṭṭha 22; Itivuttaka-Ṭṭha 4; Mahāniddesa-Ṭṭha 228 piṭṭhesu.
Saddanītisuttamālāyaṁ nāmakappe 541 sutte ca catupadavibhāge nipātapadādhikāre ca.
Sabbāvato (Pāḷi-aṭṭhakathāsu Porāṇaṭīkāyañca Moggallānabyākaraṇe catutthakaṇḍe “sabbā cāvantū”ti suttaṁ passitabbaṁ.)

sigla: Pāḷi-aṭṭhakathāsu Porāṇaṭīkāyañca Moggallānabyākaraṇe catutthakaṇḍe “sabbā cāvantū”ti suttaṁ passitabbaṁ.

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaabhinavaṭīkā/Sāmaññap.text: Sabbāvato (Pāḷi-aṭṭhakathāsu Porāṇaṭīkāyañca Moggallānabyākaraṇe catutthakaṇḍe “sabbā cāvantū”ti suttaṁ passitabbaṁ.)

sigla: Pāḷi-aṭṭhakathāsu Porāṇaṭīkāyañca Moggallānabyākaraṇe catutthakaṇḍe “sabbā cāvantū”ti suttaṁ passitabbaṁ.

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaabhinavaṭīkā/Sāmaññap.text: Anuppavecchayya (Pāḷiyaṁ Aṭṭhakathāyañca Saddanītibyākaraṇe Dhātumālāyaṁ vesudhātuyā udāharaṇāni passitabbāni.)

sigla: Pāḷiyaṁ Aṭṭhakathāyañca Saddanītibyākaraṇe Dhātumālāyaṁ vesudhātuyā udāharaṇāni passitabbāni.

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaabhinavaṭīkā/Sāmaññap.text: Anuppavecchayya (Pāḷiyaṁ Aṭṭhakathāyañca Saddanītibyākaraṇe Dhātumālāyaṁ vesudhātuyā udāharaṇāni passitabbāni.)

sigla: Pāḷiyaṁ Aṭṭhakathāyañca Saddanītibyākaraṇe Dhātumālāyaṁ vesudhātuyā udāharaṇāni passitabbāni.

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaabhinavaṭīkā/Sāmaññap.text: Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 171 piṭṭhe; Visuddhi 2. 203; Mahāniddesa-Ṭṭha 198; Paṭisaṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 322 piṭṭhesupi.
Khu 1. 42 piṭṭhe. 2. Saddanītisuttamālāyaṁ Nāmakappe 540 suttaṁ passitabbaṁ
“Ambo ca siñcito āsi, samaṇo ca nahāpito. Bahuñca puññaṁ pasutaṁ, aho saphalaṁ jīvitan”ti. (Idha Ṭīkāyaṁ mūlapāṭho)

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaabhinavaṭīkā/Ambaṭṭha.text: Khu 1. 59; Khu 10. 30, 108 piṭṭhesu. 2. Saṁ 1. 82 piṭṭhe. 3. Udāna-Ṭṭha 92 piṭṭhe.
Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 35; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 19; Khuddakapāṭha-Ṭṭha 143; Suttanipāta-Ṭṭha 1. 272; Mahāniddesa-Ṭṭha 231 piṭṭhesu.

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaabhinavaṭīkā/Soṇadaṇḍ.text: Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 257; Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 61; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 289; Udāna-Ṭṭha 305; Buddhavaṁsa-Ṭṭha 163; Cariyāpiṭaka-Ṭṭha 9, 324; Apadāna-Ṭṭha 2. 91 piṭṭhesu.
